champion.description: Plain 6,500-sample Monte Carlo post-ReLU mean estimator; selected from B0 Mini baseline by paired confidence interval.
champion.flops_used_note: S2 fix (lead audit 2026-07-16): this field was previously mislabeled `flops_used` while holding the mean per-MLP `effective_compute` value (30109415000.58, now correctly under `mean_effective_compute`). True mean raw flops_used, recomputed from experiments/results/gpt/B0-gpt-20260716T002459Z-a6fca1e-monte-carlo-mini.json, is 27346176000.0. Values were always correct; only the label was wrong.
champion.note: Promoted after B0 Mini paired gate. Full gate now complete (see full_gate below, B24); submission remains blocked by S1 (undecided last_submitted_score gate), not by a missing Full gate.

full_gate.method: Two independent 500-MLP subprocess-runner slices (indices 0-499 and 500-999 of the immutable Full split, zero overlap, zero duplicates, verified to cover all 1000 unique MLPs) via whestbench.scoring.evaluate_estimator + whestbench.runner.SubprocessRunner driven directly (not the whest CLI), because a single 1000-MLP subprocess CLI run measured ~58 minutes and exceeded the available background-task execution window twice. MANDATORY correctness check before trusting this (per B24's requirement): cross-checked the chunked methodology against the official `whest run` CLI on 20 Full-split MLPs and 30 Mini-split MLPs -- final_layer_mse matched the CLI to the exact last printed digit in both checks (bit-identical predictions, as expected for a deterministic estimator/seed), with only the timing-derived score multiplier differing by an amount consistent with ordinary run-to-run wall-clock jitter (also observed between two separate official CLI runs of the same estimator).
full_gate.note: Full-split score (8.594e-07) and MSE (7.781e-06) are consistently better than the Mini-split champion numbers (9.39e-07 / 8.505e-06) that selected this champion, with zero failure/budget/time/error flags across all 1000 MLPs -- confirms no Mini-split overfitting. This DOES satisfy the Full-split evaluation prerequisite for submission (AGENTS.md step 7 'passes the same paired gate on the independent full split'). It is a single-estimator Full-split score, not a paired comparison against a candidate -- any future candidate must still be paired-compared against the champion on this same Full split before a submission attempt. Submission itself remains blocked by S1 regardless (last_submitted_score is null, so the required 5%-improvement gate is undecidable).

submissions.note: Pre-scaffold manual submission by the user. Backfill leaderboard_score from the submissions board (match by timestamp under the team names above).
